title: norysca longistyla
intro: Norysca longistyla, also known as the 'Caterpillar Plant', is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Norysca longistyla is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
